description: Style Note Designed for the sporty soul, this pair of shorts from puma is crafted from soft and absorbent polyester fabric that offers exemplary comfort. The comfortable elasticated waistband sits snug, while you can further customise the Fit with the drawstring. Slip into these shorts when blazing the trail on a healthy run, or on casual day at home, and revel in heavenly comfort. Product Details Blue shorts with a mesh like inner, an elasticated waistband and drawstrings on the inside, side pockets, brand tab appliqued below the right pocket and printed branding on the left thigh  Material and Care Shell: 100% polyester Lining: 100% polyester Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32”) is wearing a size M
